node.statement: SUBROUTINE 2D — QSVT for Matrix Inversion (Pseudoinverse): Given an (alpha, q, epsilon)-block encoding of Hermitian matrix M with condition number kappa, implement an approximate (2, a+O(log log 1/epsilon), epsilon)-block encoding of M^c for c in (0,1] using O(alpha kappa (a+T_U) log^2(kappa/epsilon)) gates (Lemma 25, paraphrasing GSLW19 Thm 41). Applied to (F^T L F) to obtain (F^T L F)^+ = L^{-1} (Theorem 11). Key insight: F(F^T L F)^+ F^T = L^{-1} has O(1) effective condition number.
